application.doc: Retrieving the contents of a directory from the file downloads area

param.name: file_path
param.doc: The relative path of the file to be retrieved.

method.name: GET
method.id: Retrieving the contents of a directory from the file downloads area
method.doc: To retrieve the contents of a directory from the file downloads area with the RESTful web service, issue an HTTP GET command on the file downloads area resource URI.

request.doc:
Retrieve the contents of a directory non-recursively
GET https://{appliance_hostname}/isam/downloads/{file_path}/
Retrieve the contents of a sub directory
GET https://{appliance_hostname}/isam/downloads/{file_path}/{file_path}/
Retrieve the contents of a directory or a sub directory recursively
GET https://{appliance_hostname}/isam/downloads/{file_path}/?recursive=yes
GET https://{appliance_hostname}/isam/downloads/{file_path}/{file_path}/?recursive=yes

param.name: Accept:application/json
param.doc: Required for requests to the service

response.doc: There is a problem with the request. The JSON message describes the problem.
File not Found, The requested service does not exist. The JSON message indicates which resource.
An internal error occurred. The JSON message indicates the problem.
